context_of_use: Deterministic synthetic engineering QA for ECG R-peak detection, NN interval reconstruction, time-domain HRV and VLF/LF/HF metric implementations.

truth_policy.interval_definition: NN intervals are derived from consecutive accepted construction R peaks.
truth_policy.exclusion: Ectopic intervals and their adjacent intervals are explicitly excluded; excluded intervals are never bridged for successive-difference metrics.
truth_policy.spectral_window: Frequency-domain truth requires at least 300 seconds and uses the declared metric-definition interpolation policy.

short_window_rejected.reason: HRV spectral ground truth requires duration_seconds >= 300

evidence_boundary: Synthetic engineering evidence only; not clinical autonomic validation, patient-population evidence, diagnostic performance evidence, or a substitute for sponsor-specific protocol and representative clinical data.
